metadata.name: Source Titanium Forgings for Landing Gear

description: A procurement manager needs to source certified titanium forgings for a new landing gear assembly from an approved supplier.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number and material specifications for the required titanium forgings from the engineering bill of materials (BOM).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the exact part and material specs.

nodes.task_description: Query the approved supplier list to find vendors qualified to produce this specific part.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of 2-3 approved suppliers.

nodes.task_description: Issue a Request for Quotation (RFQ) to the approved suppliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and sends the RFQ to the selected suppliers.
